title: SanctionsAI Answers
description: Q&A answer pages from SanctionsAI — AI agent payment compliance

items.title: How do I screen AI agent payments for sanctions compliance?
items.content_text: SanctionsAI provides real-time OFAC/SDN screening for every AI agent transaction — checking sender and recipient wallets, payment metadata, and transaction patterns against global sanctions lists before funds move.

items.title: What is the X402 protocol for AI agent payments?
items.content_text: X402 is an open protocol for AI agent-to-agent payments over HTTP. SanctionsAI implements the full X402 spec — wallet verification, payment facilitation, and sanctions screening — allowing AI agents to transact autonomously while maintaining compliance.

items.title: What happens if an AI agent payment hits a sanctions match?
items.content_text: SanctionsAI returns a blocked transaction response with the specific sanctions list entry, match confidence score, and audit trail — the payment never executes, and the compliance team gets an instant alert with full context for regulatory reporting.
